Bhukosh Unified Download 
Reference Guide 
 
V 2.0 
  
 
Pre-Requisite(s) to access Unified Download in Bhukosh 
Only Registered Users of OCBIS Portal, Geological Survey of India will be able to access Unified 
Download functionality in Bhukosh. 
If you are a registered user ( GSI Employee  or External User) , please login to Bhukosh 
(http://bhukosh.gsi.gov.in). 
If you are an external user and not a registered user, please click on below link to Register: 
https://www.gsi.gov.in/webcenter/portal/OCBIS/pageQuickLinks/pageRegistration 
 
Please fill the mandatory fields and provide a valid Email-ID and Mobile Number, as it will be used 
for OTP verification to complete the registration process. 
Once the registration is completed successfully, please login to Bhukosh 
(http://bhukosh.gsi.gov.in). 
  

 
Login to Bhukosh 
 
 
 
  

 
Search for data using Unified Search 
Unified Search is a functionality which allows user to search for data stored in three different 
catalogues: a) Geospatial/Maps b) GSI Reports/Content c) Geophysical Data 
 
Different search filters like keyword-based search, State-District-Toposheet based Bounding Box 
Search etc. is available. 
Click on Search button to fetch the Search Results.

Add Layer/Item to Unified Download Cart 
In the Search Results window, Click on Download icon  to add the layer/item to the Unified 
Download Cart. 
 
The selected Layer/Item is now added to Unified Download Cart. Similarly, more layers/items can 
be added to the Unified Download Cart. 
 
 

 
Maximum 10 Layers/Items can be added in the Unified Download cart for each type of data – 
Geospatial/Maps or Geophysical Data or GSI Reports/Content Data. 
If more than 10 Layers/Items are added, then below popup message will appear. 
 
  

 
Browse Map Service and Add Geospatial Layer(s) to Unified Download 
Cart 
If user wants to add Geospatial Layers(s) pertaining to different Map Service(s) then it is available 
via the Unified Browse functionality in Bhukosh.  Click on Unified Browse icon, and expand the 
Maps (WMS) item 
 
Click on a WMS Serv ice. This will open the Un ified Results window with all th e layers of the 
selected WMS listed. 
 
In the Search Results window, Click on Download icon  to add the layer/item to the Unified 
Download Cart.

Set Output Settings and submit Download 
The Output Area Bounding Box is used to the download the selected layers in the cart as per the 
output Bounding Box (extent). It is mandatory to provide an Output Area Bounding Box. 
Provide the desired Output Area Bounding Box by either usi ng the State -District-Toposheet 
dropdown filters or Click on Draw button to provide a custom Bounding Box.  
 
For GSI Employees, there is provision to set the Output Area Bounding Box as per their assigned 
FSP item. The Output Area will be as per Toposheet/Bounding Box provided in the FSP Item. 
 

 
If a custom Bounding Box is drawn on the map using the Draw button, then the bounding box 
area must be less than 50000 sq. km. If the output area exceeds 50000 sq.km. then below 
message will pop up. 
 
The Validate button is provided, to check if the selected layers fall inside/outside the Output Area 
Bounding Box. 
 
 

 
Select the desired Output Format as either SHP (Shapefile) or GML. 
 
Click on “Click to see the Terms and Conditions”  to view the Terms and Conditions. Click on 
Agree button. 
 

 
Click on Download button. 
 
After the data download request has been processed successfully, the Download Link(s) will be 
to the registered Email-ID. 
 

 
Data Download Package 
User will receive an Email on their registered Email -ID as below. Click on here to download the 
data package. 
 
Extract the Data Download Package zip file.

The downloaded Layers are in Shapefile format. 
Any GIS Software which supports Shapefile format, can be used to open the downloaded 
shapefiles. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
If you are facing any issues related to Unified Download in Bhukosh, please write 
to ocbis.helpdesk@gsi.gov.in.
